name: herald-sol
description: HERALD Sol - SERP / entity-graph agent (Lambda), fully deterministic + generate-not-submit. Emits schema.org Person/Organization JSON-LD + sameAs + Wikidata seed statements, computes the KYC-coverage scorecard (herald_coverage, screen 05), runs a SERP audit behind an injectable interface (no paid-API dependency), and produces Google Knowledge-Panel claim payloads + checklists. One agent = one service (SEC-3). Envelope per SPEC-B section 7.
